headline: Global Precipitated Silica Market Forecast 2036: How Evonik Industries AG, Solvay SA & PPG Industries Inc. Are Driving Industry Growth Across India, China & USA
summary: According to the latest market analysis by Future Market Insights (FMI), the global precipitated silica market is witnessing strong growth as tire manufacturers, adhesive producers, and industrial formulators increase demand for high-performance filler materials.
